    Description
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsWorkbook.addClonedStyle(String name, JxlsStyle style)
    Creates a JxlsStyle based upon another existing JxlsStyle which can be referenced when using sheet.setValue(column, row, value, style)

    Creates a JxlsStyle which can be referenced when using sheet.setValue(column, row, value, style)

    Creates a JxlsStyle which can be referenced when using sheet.setValue(column, row, value, style)

    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setAlign(short align)
    Sets the justification to use to render the content of the cell
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setBold()
    Make the cell using this style bold
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setBold(boolean isBold)
    Make the cell using this style bold or not
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setBorder(short place, short borderStyle)
    Sets the borders for some of the sides of the cell
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setBorderColor(short borderColor)
    Sets the border color for the 4 sides of the cell
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setBorders(short top, short bottom, short left, short right)
    Sets the borders for the 4 sides of the cell
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setCellColor(short bgColor)
    Sets the color to use to render the background of the cell
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setFontName(String fontName)
    Sets the font name to use in this style
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setFontSize(int fontSize)
    Sets the font size to use in this style
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setFormat(String format)
    Sets the format to use to display numbers using this style
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setTextColor(short textColor)
    Sets the color to use to render the writing of the cell
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsStyle.setWrap(boolean wraps)
    Make the cell wraps its content
    Methods in org.openxava.util.jxls with parameters of type JxlsStyle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsWorkbook.addClonedStyle(String name, JxlsStyle style)
    Creates a JxlsStyle based upon another existing JxlsStyle which can be referenced when using sheet.setValue(column, row, value, style)
    JxlsStyle
    JxlsWorkbook.addClonedStyle(JxlsStyle style)
     
    JxlsSheet
    JxlsSheet.setColumnStyles(int column, JxlsStyle... styles)
    Sets the width of one or more columns
    JxlsCell
    JxlsSheet.setFormula(int column, int row, String formula, JxlsStyle style)
    Sets the formula at column,row sheet.setFormula(1, 1, "=A1+$A2+$R1C3+R1$C4");
    void
    JxlsSheet.setHeaders(int startColumn, int row, JxlsStyle style, String... headers)
    Sets column headers Usage: // set the first column header as "Invoice" with style // do not set any header for the second column // set the third column as "Customer" with style and a width of 20 // set the fourth column as "Customer" with style, right alignment and a width of 10 setHeaders(1, 1, style, "Invoice", null, "Customer|20", "Cost|r", "Margin|r|10");
    JxlsCell
    JxlsCell.setStyle(JxlsStyle style)
    Sets the style of the cell
    JxlsCell
    JxlsSheet.setValue(int column, int row, Object value, JxlsStyle style)
    Sets the value at column,row
